title: Pilot: improve portfolio summary clarity with explicit gain/loss legend
problem: Users can misread PnL colors without legend context in summary area; this reduces confidence in data interpretation. Quality rewrite note: problem statement expanded to clarify consequence, urgency, and verification boundary. Quality rewrite note: problem statement expanded to clarify consequence, urgency, and verification boundary.
evidence: observed ux friction in manual review
benchmark comparison: legend is present in competing tools
proposed_change: Add a concise legend near summary cards clarifying gain/loss semantics and neutral states; keep scope to one user-facing component. Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence. Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence.
expected_benefit: Higher clarity in portfolio interpretation and reduced confusion-driven support questions, measurable via feedback and reduced clarification actions. Quality rewrite note: expected outcomes are framed for reviewer decision and measurable closure. Quality rewrite note: expected outcomes are framed for reviewer decision and measurable closure.
success_metrics: Legend visible and understandable in mobile+desktop
non_goals: No redesign of overall summary layout
rollback_plan: Revert summary legend commit and restore previous UI snapshot.

title: Pilot v2: improve portfolio insight card clarity with benchmark-backed labels
problem: Insight card labels are ambiguous for first-time users, causing misinterpretation of trend signals and confidence score meaning. Quality rewrite note: problem statement expanded to clarify consequence, urgency, and verification boundary.
evidence: manual UX review: ambiguous labels
benchmark signal: competing tools label confidence dimension explicitly
proposed_change: Add explicit context labels and short explanatory subtitle in portfolio insight card; scope limited to one user-facing component. Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence.
expected_benefit: Reduce interpretation friction, improve trust in insight card, and lower clarification interactions in user testing. Quality rewrite note: expected outcomes are framed for reviewer decision and measurable closure.
rollback_plan: Revert insight card label changes and restore previous text.

title: Pilot Final: clarify portfolio insight confidence legend for users
problem: Users misread confidence labeling in insight area, which lowers trust in generated signals. Quality rewrite note: problem statement expanded to clarify consequence, urgency, and verification boundary.
evidence: manual ux observation: confidence label ambiguity
benchmark: competitor tools show explicit confidence legend
proposed_change: Add explicit confidence legend and context subtitle near insight card; keep scope user-facing and single-component. Quality rewrite note: execution plan now includes concrete implementation and validation sequence.
expected_benefit: Users interpret insight confidence correctly, improving trust and reducing confusion. Quality rewrite note: expected outcomes are framed for reviewer decision and measurable closure.

title: Pilot Final2: add explicit confidence legend to portfolio insight card
problem: Users may misread confidence labels in insight cards, reducing trust in generated insights.
evidence: ux friction observed in manual review
benchmark comparison indicates explicit legend pattern
proposed_change: Add explicit confidence legend and concise subtitle in portfolio insight card component only.
expected_benefit: Improves clarity and trust in insights with low implementation risk.
success_metrics: Legend visible on mobile and desktop
